description: A meteorologist at a National Weather Service (NWS) forecast office needs to reconfigure their Chrome browser as a severe weather monitoring workstation following a system refresh. Configure the browser according to the NWS Forecast Office Operational Browser Standard found at ~/Desktop/nws_browser_standard.txt. Organize the 32 existing bookmarks into five operational folders and one personal folder, configure search engine shortcuts (radar, spc, nhc), and update the startup page, homepage, and privacy settings. Set the download directory to ~/Documents/Weather_Data with the 'always ask' prompt enabled. Generate a shift-handoff configuration summary at ~/Desktop/config_handoff.txt.
